summary: Testing of JT-Zero Phase 11 tabbed UI overhaul. All 7 tabs render correctly. All backend tests pass (43/43 = 100%). Settings tab with simulator sliders functional. Documentation tab shows 11-step Ukrainian Pi Zero install guide and GPIO wiring diagram. All features working as expected.
passed_tests: All 7 tabs render correctly: Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings
Dashboard tab: 3D view, drone telemetry, sensor panels, camera, MAVLink, performance, event log all render
Settings tab: All 6 simulator sliders work (wind speed, direction, noise, battery drain, mass, drag)
Settings tab: Reset button resets config to defaults
Settings tab: Runtime/System Resources/MAVLink/Hardware Sensors/Thread Status/Engine Statistics sections all display data
Docs tab: 6 subsections render (Pi Zero Install, Wiring/GPIO, API Reference, Thread Model, File Structure, Hardware)
Docs Install section: Shows 11 steps in Ukrainian with command blocks
Docs Wiring section: GPIO table for MPU6050, BMP280, GPS, PMW3901 and ASCII pinout diagram
Events tab: Event log renders with scrollable container, shows Time/Pri/Type/Message columns
Tab navigation: Clicking each tab switches content correctly
WebSocket connection works - data-testid='app-root' loads, header shows connection status (LINK)
Status pills in tab nav show THREADS 8/8, MODE C++, EVT counts
POST /api/simulator/config endpoint works for updating simulator settings (tested wind_speed=5.0)
Telemetry tab: Shows telemetry charts, performance panel with C++ NATIVE badge, sensor panels
Camera/VO tab: Shows large camera panel with FPS, frames, resolution, VO quality and delta values
MAVLink tab: Shows MAVLink panel (CONNECTED), Commands panel with ARM/DISARM/TAKEOFF/LAND/HOLD/RTL/E-STOP buttons
critical_code_review_comments: All new SettingsTab.js components work correctly with proper data-testid attributes
DocumentationTab.js properly implements 6 subsections with Ukrainian Pi Zero install guide
EventLog.js fullPage mode working correctly with scrollable container
Slider decimal precision fix verified - sliders display values correctly
Events prop passed correctly to DashboardTab (bug fix verified)
Tab navigation responsive and correctly switches between 7 tabs
All data-testid attributes present for testability
seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses C++ native runtime simulated sensor data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 11 tabbed UI features verified: 7 tabs (Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings), SettingsTab with 6 working sliders and reset button, DocumentationTab with 11-step Ukrainian Pi Zero install guide and GPIO wiring table. Events prop bug fix verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_jtzero_api.py covers all REST endpoints. Status pills show THREADS 8/8, MODE C++, EVT counts.
